creator: luca.pizzamiglio@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 160637
Initial patch to 7.10

This patch update the devel/gdb to 7.10, removing several patches already committed in upstream.
Could you please double check it, before a I make a proper PR?

I still have this occasional SIGHUP on "follow-fork-mode child". A guess: if the parent process ends before the child, can gdb get confused and close consoles to the child, causing the SIGHUP?

In other words, gdb could intercept the SIGCHLD of the parent process closes the console the child...
